reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a message requesting GitHub username via tool usage, granted account access when prompted, approved API requests, and verified the agent returned the correct GitHub username "yiw190".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with sidebar containing agents list including "QA-20260419-010311-jnsi"
Clicked on "QA-20260419-010311-jnsi" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened showing landing page with message input field and agent status displaying "idle"
Verified agent status - Status indicator showed "idle" which satisfies the requirement of "running" or "idle"

Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was entered and sent, agent transitioned to "working" status, new session "GitHub Username Identity Check" was created

Account access request card appeared - Card displayed "Account Access Request" asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?" with GitHub account already selected and "Allow Access (1)" button available
Clicked "Allow Access" button - Account access was granted, agent resumed processing and started executing Bash commands
API request review card appeared - Card displayed "API Request Review" asking to allow GET /user request to GitHub
Clicked "Allow" button and selected "Allow Once" - Permission was granted for the API request
Agent completed response - Agent returned message "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with status transitioning back to "idle" and execution time shown as "Worked for 44s"
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly contains username "yiw190" as required, and screenshot was captured showing the complete interaction and final result
